description: Semantic caching database schema -- AssetLibrary table in Supabase (PostgreSQL + pgvector) per Section 4.10. Columns: id, slot_type, original_prompt, prompt_embedding (VECTOR(1536)), image_url, has_alpha, width, height, usage_count, created_at, last_used_at. Indexes: ivfflat on prompt_embedding with vector_cosine_ops, btree on slot_type. R2/S3 storage strategy for cached images.
notes: Tier 4 integration. Medium priority. Database schema only -- middleware logic is OBJ-054.
